title: Buying a Car 买车咨询

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: I am looking for a reliable family car. What would you recommend?
lines.cn: 我想买一辆可靠的家用车。你有什么推荐？

lines.speaker: Dealer
lines.content: This SUV is very popular. It has great safety ratings and plenty of space for a family of five.
lines.cn: 这款SUV很受欢迎。安全评级很高，而且空间足够五口之家使用。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: What is the fuel consumption like? I commute every day.
lines.cn: 油耗怎么样？我每天要通勤。

lines.speaker: Dealer
lines.content: It does about thirty miles per gallon. It is quite fuel-efficient for its size.
lines.cn: 每加仑大概能跑30英里。对于这个尺寸的车来说，算是很省油了。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: Can I take it for a test drive? I want to see how it feels on the road.
lines.cn: 我可以试驾一下吗？我想看看上路的感觉。

lines.speaker: Dealer
lines.content: Absolutely. Let me get the keys. We have a test route near the highway.
lines.cn: 当然可以。我去拿钥匙。我们高速公路附近有一条试驾路线。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: I like the driving experience. What is the price after all taxes and fees?
lines.cn: 我喜欢这个驾驶体验。含所有税费后的总价是多少？

lines.speaker: Dealer
lines.content: The total price is twenty-eight thousand five hundred dollars. We also offer zero-interest financing for three years.
lines.cn: 总价是两万八千五百美元。我们还提供三年零息贷款。

lines.speaker: Buyer
lines.content: That sounds good. Can I trade in my old car? It is a 2015 sedan.
lines.cn: 听起来不错。我可以用旧车置换吗？是一辆2015年的轿车。

lines.speaker: Dealer
lines.content: Yes, we accept trade-ins. Let me evaluate your car, and we can give you an offer.
lines.cn: 可以，我们接受置换。让我评估一下你的车，然后给你报价。
